title: phlox pilosa subsp. detonsa
intro: Phlox pilosa subsp. detonsa, also known as downy phlox, is a perennial herb belonging to the phlox family (Polemoniaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phlox pilosa subsp. detonsa include its use as a treatment for wounds, skin irritations, and infections, due to its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
